Buyer Login
Jaipur, Rajasthan — Est. Artisan Network

Authentic Rajasthan handicrafts, crafted by hand, exported with trust.

We connect skilled artisans across Rajasthan with international buyers — bringing genuine craftsmanship, transparent sourcing, and reliable export systems to your business.

Our Company

Heritage, made exportable.

We are not a factory. We are a bridge between Rajasthan's finest artisans and the world.

Maru Crafts was built on a simple belief — that the handwork of Rajasthan's carvers, painters, and metalsmiths deserves a global stage, presented with the same professionalism as any established export house.

We don't run our own manufacturing units. Instead, we work directly with a trusted network of skilled artisans, maintain strict quality control at every stage, and export finished pieces under our own brand — so buyers get consistency without losing authenticity.

Direct Network

No middlemen layers between artisan and export.

Quality Control

Every piece inspected before it leaves Rajasthan.

Cultural Integrity

Techniques passed through generations, preserved.

Buyer Partnership

Long-term relationships, not one-time transactions.

We don't just sell products. We carry the skill of an artisan and the heritage of Rajasthan to the world.

Meet Our Artisans

The hands behind every piece.

Every product is traceable to a named artisan — their craft, their story, their region.
